title: hordeum iranicum
intro: Hordeum iranicum, also known as Iranian barley, is a species of barley that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hordeum iranicum include its ability to help lower blood sugar levels, reduce cholesterol, and improve digestive health. Hordeum iranicum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used as a dietary supplement in some parts of the world.
